zh.lifeSummary: 當William Borthwick of Cactune, 1st of Borthwick於1350年之前出生在蘇格蘭時，他的父親Thomas Borthwick33歲，母親Janet Filia Bromley44歲。他和Margaret Hay Heiress of Locherworth至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1425年7月16日之後在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Borthwick of Cactune, 1st of Borthwick于1350年之前出生在苏格兰时，他的父亲Thomas Borthwick33岁，母亲Janet Filia Bromley44岁。他和Margaret Hay Heiress of Locherworth至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1425年7月16日之后在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Borthwick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the old barony of Borthwick, formerly Loquhariot (Midlothian) and possibly also from Borthwick (Roxburghshire). The placenames are from Old English bord ‘board, table’ + wīc ‘outlying dairy farm’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Borthwick of Cactune, 1st of Borthwick was born before 1350, in Scotland, his father, Thomas Borthwick, was 33 and his mother, Janet Filia Bromley, was 44. He had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Margaret Hay Heiress of Locherworth. He died after 16 July 1425, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Borthwick of Cactune, 1st of Borthwick est né avant 1350, à Écosse, son père, Thomas Borthwick, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Janet Filia Bromley, avait 44 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Margaret Hay Heiress of Locherworth. Il est décédé après 16 juillet 1425, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Borthwick of Cactune, 1st of Borthwick vor 1350 in Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Borthwick 33 und seine Mutter Janet Filia Bromley 44. Er hatte mit Margaret Hay Heiress of Locherworth mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb nach 16. Juli 1425 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Borthwick of Cactune, 1st of Borthwick è nato il prima del 1350 nel Scotland, il suo padre, Thomas Borthwick, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Janet Filia Bromley, aveva 44 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Margaret Hay Heiress of Locherworth. Morì dopo il 16 luglio 1425, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: William Borthwick of Cactune, 1st of Borthwickが1350年以前にスコットランドで生まれた時，父Thomas Borthwickは33歳，母Janet Filia Bromleyは44歳であった。彼はMargaret Hay Heiress of Locherworthとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1425年7月16日以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Borthwick of Cactune, 1st of Borthwick(이)가 1350년 이전 스컷랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Borthwick(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Janet Filia Bromley(은)는 44세였다. 그는 Margaret Hay Heiress of Locherworth(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1425년 7월 16일 이후 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Borthwick of Cactune, 1st of Borthwick nasceu antes 1350, em Scotland, seu pai, Thomas Borthwick, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Janet Filia Bromley, tinha 44 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Margaret Hay Heiress of Locherworth. Ele faleceu após 16 de julho de 1425, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Borthwick of Cactune, 1st of Borthwick родился перед 1350 г. в местности Шотландия, его отцу по имени Thomas Borthwick было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Janet Filia Bromley, 44. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Margaret Hay Heiress of Locherworth. Он умер после 16 июля 1425 г. в его родном городе.
